title: Wind
questions: Does your country suffer from hurricanes and/or tornadoes?
What do you think causes a hurricane or a tornado?
To what extent do you think hurricanes and tornadoes are caused by changes in the global climate?
What can be done to limit the damage caused by strong winds?
Can you remember any incidents in your country where strong winds caused damage? What happened?
Do you know anyone who is either a windbag or a bit long-winded?
Have you ever had a windfall?
In what circumstances do you get your second wind?
Have you ever thrown caution to the winds? What happened? (If not, can you think of any circumstances in which you might be tempted to throw caution to the wind?)
When you speak to your teacher, parents or boss, do you ever sail close to the wind?
What does the title of this worksheet (What's in the wind?) mean?
How useful do you think wind power is as an alternative source of energy?
